revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-270

Spurious radiation at frequencies resulting from intermodulation between the oscillation and the carrier, characteristic or harmonic frequencies of an emission, or the oscillations which appear when this carrier or characteristic oscillations are produced, and oscillations of the same nature of the same or several other emissions originating from the same or different transmitting systems.

Reference: C.C.I.R. (modified)
